input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.8 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.8
            TITLE: instructions from officials

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.8: Instructions from Officials
D.3.8 Instructions from Officials 
Obey flags and hand signals from course marshals and officials immediately

final_answer: rule D.3.8: Instructions from Officials Obey flags and hand signals from course marshals and officials immediately
